expiry_rule: 0DTE ONLY — same day expiry, no exceptions

contract_selection.sweet_spot: $0.55–$0.70 per share — best R:R for $30 max loss rule
contract_selection.type: Buy CALLS on bullish FVG setups, buy PUTS on bearish FVG setups
contract_selection.strike: ATM or 1 strike OTM — stay close to the money on 0DTE

strict_filters: SKIP any option priced below $0.50 — too far OTM, low delta, lottery ticket
SKIP any option priced above $0.90 — too expensive, risk exceeds comfort zone
ONLY enter if premium is between $0.50 and $0.90 per share

risk_per_trade.max_loss: $30 — achieved by exiting at 50% of premium paid
risk_per_trade.stop_loss: Exit immediately at 50% loss on premium (e.g. paid $0.60 → exit at $0.30)
risk_per_trade.take_profit_1: Exit 50% of position at 100% gain (e.g. paid $0.60 → sell half at $1.20)
risk_per_trade.take_profit_2: Let remaining 50% run to 150%+ gain or until 1:00 PM ET, whichever comes first

bullish: Price is above VWAP on the 15min and 5min charts
EMA is sloping upward on the 15min chart
Break of Structure (BOS) to the upside confirmed on 15min
Bullish FVG present on 15min — buy 0DTE CALLS when price taps the FVG
Option premium is between $0.50 and $0.90 — if not, skip
bearish: Price is below VWAP on the 15min and 5min charts
EMA is sloping downward on the 15min chart
Break of Structure (BOS) to the downside confirmed on 15min
Bearish FVG present on 15min — buy 0DTE PUTS when price taps the FVG
Option premium is between $0.50 and $0.90 — if not, skip
neutral: Price chopping around VWAP — DO NOT buy 0DTE premium in chop
EMA flat or price crossing it repeatedly
No clear BOS or FVG on 15min — sit on hands
Theta decay on 0DTE is brutal in choppy conditions — patience is a position

identification: FVG is a 3-candle formation where price moves aggressively in one direction
Bullish FVG: gap between candle 1 HIGH and candle 3 LOW — buy CALLS on retest
Bearish FVG: gap between candle 1 LOW and candle 3 HIGH — buy PUTS on retest
CE (Consequent Encroachment) = midpoint of the FVG — ideal entry point
Only trade FVGs on 15min timeframe for 0DTE setups
entry_rules: Wait for price to retrace INTO the FVG zone on underlying chart
Enter 0DTE option when price touches the CE (midpoint) of the FVG
Confirm direction with VWAP and EMA on 15min before entering
Check option chain — premium MUST be $0.50–$0.90, otherwise skip
Use 1min chart for precise entry trigger — look for rejection candle at CE
exit_rules: STOP: Exit immediately at 50% loss on premium — no averaging down
TARGET 1: Sell 50% at 100% gain on premium
TARGET 2: Trail stop on remaining 50%, exit by 1:00 PM ET at latest
HARD EXIT: Close ALL 0DTE positions by 3:30 PM ET — never hold into close
INVALIDATION #1: Exit if underlying closes through FVG on 5min candle
INVALIDATION #2 (VWAP CROSS): Exit IMMEDIATELY if price crosses VWAP against trade direction — no wait, no hope. Shorts die above VWAP, longs die below VWAP
INVALIDATION #3 (EMA FLIP): Exit if MA #1 crosses MA #2 against trade direction on 15min — bias has changed
TIME STOP: If the trade has not worked by 11:30 AM ET, exit regardless of P&L. News-driven setups either work fast or not at all
best_trading_windows: 9:35–10:30 AM ET — highest momentum, best FVG setups of the day
10:30–11:30 AM ET — secondary window, only if clear bias remains
1:30–2:30 PM ET — afternoon trend continuation setups
AVOID: 11:30 AM–1:30 PM ET — lunch chop, theta burning fastest
AVOID: After 3:00 PM ET — 0DTE decay accelerates dangerously

gap_day_protocol.definition: Any day where SPY or QQQ gaps up OR down by more than 0.5% at the open compared to the prior close — usually triggered by overnight news (geopolitical, Fed, earnings, etc.)
gap_day_protocol.why_this_matters: Gap days are whipsaw traps. Gap-down opens often get FILLED during the session as initial fear fades. Gap-up opens often get FADED as greed cools. Fading a gap in the first 30 minutes is one of the most expensive mistakes — the market punishes early conviction.
rules: DO NOT trade the first 30 minutes of a gap day — sit out from 9:30 to 10:00 AM ET and WATCH
NEVER fade a gap in the first hour — gaps fill more often than they extend
Wait for the 9:45–10:15 AM range to establish before committing to a direction
Confirm trend with TWO consecutive 15min candles closing in the same direction
Require BOTH VWAP and EMA to align with trade direction — no exceptions on gap days
If the gap fills before 11:00 AM, the directional thesis is DEAD — do not re-enter same direction
Size DOWN by 50% on gap days — use half your normal position size to account for higher volatility
No more than 1 trade per gap day — if the first trade loses, stop for the day
Cancel ALL pending setup alerts from pre-market planning — the gap invalidates the prior day's analysis
If news is breaking intraday (Trump statement, Fed headline, etc.) — CLOSE all positions immediately
gap_down_specific: Gap-down PUT setups are LOW probability — the market often snaps back
If you must short a gap down, wait for FAILED rally back to VWAP and rejection — NOT the initial open
Better play: wait for gap fill and then short from the prior day's close as resistance
If price reclaims VWAP within the first hour, flip to CALL bias — the gap is filling
gap_up_specific: Gap-up CALL setups work better when supported by strong premarket volume
If price fails to hold the gap and breaks back below the open, flip to PUT bias
Avoid buying the initial spike — wait for pullback to VWAP or first 15min low
gap_day_protocol.post_mortem_rule: After any gap day, whether you traded or not, document what happened: did the gap fill, extend, or chop? This builds pattern recognition for future gap days.

risk_rules: 0DTE ONLY — no other expiries under any circumstances
Premium must be between $0.50 and $0.90 per share — hard rule, no exceptions
Maximum loss per trade: $30 (50% stop on premium paid)
If daily loss reaches $60 (2 stopped-out trades), stop trading for the day
Minimum R:R of 1:2 on premium (risk $30, target $60+)
No trading 9:30–9:35 AM ET — let the open settle
On gap days (>0.5% open gap), no trading until 10:00 AM ET minimum
No new entries after 3:00 PM ET on 0DTE
Close ALL positions by 3:30 PM ET — no exceptions
Only trade SPY and QQQ options
Never average down on a losing 0DTE position
Never hold through a major news event or Fed announcement
VWAP CROSS = INSTANT EXIT — if price crosses VWAP against your position, close immediately
TIME STOP at 11:30 AM ET — if setup hasn't worked, close the position regardless of stop loss
On gap days, size down 50% — volatility is elevated and whipsaws are common
notes: Strict 0DTE options trader — SPY and QQQ only. Premium range $0.50–$0.90 per share ($50–$90 per contract). Stop at 50% loss = max $30–$45 risk per trade. FVG setups on 15min only. Best windows: 9:35–10:30 AM and 1:30–2:30 PM ET. Avoid lunch chop and never hold 0DTE past 3:30 PM. Theta decay kills 0DTE value fast — only trade high-conviction FVG setups with full VWAP and EMA confirmation.
